hero.title: The leasing stack rebuilt around AI, not retrofitted onto it.
hero.tagline: Fit for Digital. Fit for AI.
hero.body: I help leasing, consumer finance, and fleet operators rebuild the core they have outgrown. Diagnostic to working platform in months, not years. The product roadmap and the advisory practice both come from nearly two decades inside European leasing operations.

problem.title: Mid-tier operators are running on stacks they have outgrown.
problem.body: Leasing companies, captives, IFNs, and fleet operators reach a point where the existing systems cannot keep up with new products, new channels, and new compliance demands. By the time the rebuild board paper gets approved, the next product cycle is already lost and the AI-native challengers have shipped twice. Innovia closes the gap as a specialist advisory practice with a working platform behind it, not a slide pack and a partner search.

thesis.title: The UI layer is being commoditised. The core, the config, and the speed are not.
thesis.body: LLMs and workflow orchestration are eating the front end of every enterprise application. What stays defensible is the auditable, deterministic core, the domain configuration each partner builds on top of it, and the speed at which both can move together. Innovia is structured around that thesis from day one. The first whitepaper expands on where the moat actually moves in lending — see Whitepapers.

services.title: Diagnostics, redesign, prototype, implementation.
services.body: Innovia operates as a specialist consultancy with technology delivery built in. The four engagement types stack: most partners start with a diagnostic and move through redesign into prototype deployment and implementation support.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.body: A structured read on where your origination, decisioning, contract lifecycle, and reporting stack stand against current operator benchmarks. Decision-grade output the leadership team can act on.

redesign.title: Operating-model redesign
redesign.body: Target operating model for the segments you serve: org, process, data, technology. Sequenced to what the business can actually absorb.

prototype.title: Software prototyping
prototype.body: Working prototypes on the Innovia platform, configured to your data model and products. Ready for live testing within weeks.

implementation.title: Implementation support
implementation.body: From prototype to production: integration, data migration, change management, hypercare. I stay until the platform runs the business, not the other way around.

modules.title: Five verticals, one engine.
modules.body: Prototyping and implementation engagements run on the Innovia platform. Five modules share the same engine, data model, and workflow orchestrator. Asset Finance and Fleet are prototype-mature today. Working Capital, Consumer Credit, and Secured Microcredit are in active co-development with design partners for 2026-2027.

assetFinance.title: Asset Finance
assetFinance.body: Origination, scoring, contract lifecycle, billing, accounting. End-to-end for financial and operational lease, with cross-tenant group reporting.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.body: Vehicle and service management for captives and independent fleets. Telematics-ready, with cost-per-km and residual value analytics.

workingCapital.title: Working Capital
workingCapital.body: Corporate credit lines, drawdowns, interest runs, covenant tracking. Revolving, term, and uncommitted facilities, distinct from dealer floorplan.

consumerCredit.title: Consumer Credit
consumerCredit.body: Point-of-sale and direct-to-consumer lending. Sub-15-minute decisioning, merchant integration, KYC and AML built in.

securedMicrocredit.title: Secured Microcredit
securedMicrocredit.body: Pawn-style, partner-channel, and merchant-bundled lending. Collateral tracking, rapid disbursement, full-cycle compliance.

partnership.title: Innovation Partnership.
partnership.body: Year one runs as a co-creation engagement. The partner gets a configured deployment, decision rights on their module roadmap, and the operator depth that comes from nearly two decades of running European leasing platforms.

configured.title: Configured deployment
configured.body: A working platform shaped to the partner's data model, products, and processes from day one.

decision.title: Decision rights
decision.body: The partner co-owns the module roadmap. What ships first, second, and third reflects their priorities.

operator.title: Operator depth
operator.body: Nearly two decades operating European leasing platforms. Engagements start from operator-grade domain context.

outcome.title: Concrete outcome
outcome.body: At the end of Year 1 you have a deployment running your products on your data, not a stack of slides and a vendor selection memo.

operator.title: Built by an operator.
operator.body: Nearly two decades operating European leasing platforms across automotive, equipment, and captive finance, in mid-tier and group settings. The work covered migrations, multi-country rollouts, credit-policy redesign, regulatory change, and the unglamorous month-end firefighting that turns a platform from theoretical to trusted. The product roadmap and the advisory practice both reflect what actually breaks in production.

whitepapersIndex.title: The Innovia view.
whitepapersIndex.body: Opinionated, operator-grade notes on where the lending stack is moving. New papers as the platform expands.

contact.title: Sizing a platform decision for 2026-2027?
contact.body: Open to a conversation if you operate in any of the five segments above. The first call is a 45-minute working session: your roadmap, my prototype, an honest read on fit.

footer.tagline: Fit for Digital. Fit for AI.
